entity.label: Obil
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A keeper of camels, an Ishmaelite who was “over the camels” in the time of David (1 Chr. 27:30).

nodes.label: Obil
nodes.description: A keeper of camels, an Ishmaelite who was “over the camels” in the time of David (1 Chr. 27:30).

verses.text: Over the camels also was Obil the Ishmaelite: and over the asses was Jehdeiah the Meronothite:
